tests.name: explicit-invocation
tests.prompt: Please perform a design system audit on our latest component library, focusing particularly on token consistency and naming conventions.

criteria: Includes a summary of overall system health and highlights major findings.
Analyzes token consistency, identifying any redundancy or gaps.
Evaluates naming conventions across components and tokens.
Provides a maturity score and offers recommendations for improvement.
Addresses critical areas such as accessibility and spacing/density issues.

tests.name: implicit-invocation
tests.prompt: We're preparing for a major release and need to ensure our design library is robust and ready. Can you help us identify any weak areas or gaps?

criteria: Identifies gaps or weaknesses in the design system.
Evaluates the maturity and completeness of components.
Suggests improvements or optimizations needed for a major release.
Checks for alignment with common design system taxonomies.

tests.name: edge-case
tests.prompt: We have a collection of unusual components that don't fit typical categories. Can you assess whether our component structure makes sense and if there are any missing elements?

criteria: Considers components that do not fit traditional categories without bias.
Evaluates the component structure for logical organization and gap analysis.
Assesses whether the unique components serve practical needs.
Provides innovative recommendations for improvement while considering edge cases.
